nasb.text: Whoever secretly slanders his neighbor, him I will destroy; No one who has a haughty look and an arrogant heart will I endure.

esv.text: Whoever slanders his neighbor secretly I will destroy. Whoever has a haughty look and an arrogant heart I will not endure.

cnv.text: 暗中誹謗鄰舍的，我必把他滅絕； 眼目高傲，心裡驕橫的， 我必不容忍他。

ccb.text: 我要消灭暗中毁谤邻居的人， 也不容忍心高气傲的人。

csbs.text: 暗中说邻人坏话的，我要除尽； 眼目高傲、心里骄横的，我不容忍。
